title: User Registration and Email Confirmation
description: Verify that users can register as anesthesiologists or secretaries and confirm their email addresses successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to registration page.
Fill in valid user details for anesthesiologist role.
Submit registration form.
Check a confirmation email is sent.
Click on email confirmation link.
Verify user email status is confirmed and user can log in.
Repeat registration flow for secretary role and confirm email.

title: Login with Email and Password
description: Check login functionality works correctly with valid and invalid credentials with appropriate error handling.

steps.description: Navigate to login page.
Enter valid email and password.
Click login button.
Verify that user is redirected to the appropriate dashboard.
Navigate to login page again.
Enter invalid email or password.
Click login button.
Verify error message is shown indicating login failure.

title: Password Recovery and Reset
description: Validate password recovery and reset features including email delivery and password update.

steps.description: Navigate to forgot password page.
Submit registered email for password recovery.
Verify that a reset password email is sent.
Use reset link from email to access reset password page.
Submit new password.
Verify password is updated and user can log in with new password.
Attempt to use expired or invalid reset token.
Verify appropriate error message is displayed and reset action is blocked.

title: Role-Based Access Control and Route Protection
description: Ensure routes are protected and accessible only by authenticated users with correct roles (anesthesiologist or secretary).

steps.description: Attempt to access anesthesiologist dashboard as unauthenticated user.
Verify redirection to login page.
Log in as secretary and try to access anesthesiologist-only pages like procedure management.
Verify access is denied or redirected with proper notification.
Log in as anesthesiologist and try to access secretary-only dashboard.
Verify access is denied or redirected accordingly.

title: Dashboard Metrics and Real-time Notifications Display
description: Verify that anesthesiologist dashboard displays correct and updated metrics, graphs and real-time notifications.

steps.description: Log in as anesthesiologist.
Verify metrics such as recent procedures, revenues, and goals are displayed accurately.
Verify charts show correct performance data.
Trigger notification event (e.g., payment status update).
Verify notification is received instantly in real-time notification area.

title: Procedure Creation with OCR and Image Upload
description: Validate that anesthesiologists can create a procedure, upload images, and the OCR processes medical label data accurately.

steps.description: Navigate to new procedure page.
Fill in procedure details manually.
Upload images containing medical labels for OCR processing.
Verify OCR extracts data and populates corresponding fields.
Submit the new procedure.
Verify procedure is saved and appears in procedure list and history.
Test OCR with poor quality images.
Verify system provides fallback manual input option and appropriate error feedback.

title: Procedure Editing and History Search
description: Verify editing existing procedures updates data correctly and history search functionality returns accurate results.

steps.description: Open an existing procedure from list or search.
Modify some fields like procedure date or medications.
Save changes.
Verify updated information is stored and displayed.
Perform search on procedure history with various filters (date range, procedure type).
Verify search returns matching procedure records accurately.

title: Financial Records Management and Status Update
description: Test creating, editing, and deleting revenue and expense records, including status of payments and goals tracking.

steps.description: Navigate to financial module.
Add new revenue record with amount, date, and client details.
Verify record appears in the financial list with correct status.
Edit an existing expense record to update amount and status.
Verify changes are saved and reflected correctly.
Delete a financial record.
Verify record is removed and related financial metrics and goals are updated.
Test edge cases like negative amounts, missing mandatory fields.
Verify validation feedback prevents invalid data submission.

title: Report Generation with Filters and Export
description: Verify reports can be generated with custom filters and exported accurately as PDF and CSV files.

steps.description: Navigate to reports module.
Apply filters such as date range, procedure type, and payment status.
Generate report.
Verify report data matches filters and is displayed correctly.
Export report as PDF.
Verify that downloaded PDF file contains accurate and complete report data.
Export report as CSV.
Verify that CSV file is properly formatted and contains all filtered data.
Generate report with filters yielding no data.
Verify system handles empty report gracefully with appropriate messaging.

title: Secretary Management and Permissions
description: Validate that anesthesiologists can add secretaries, assign permissions, and secretaries can access only authorized features.

steps.description: Log in as anesthesiologist and navigate to secretary management.
Add a new secretary with specific permission levels.
Verify secretary receives invitation and can register.
Log in as secretary.
Verify secretary dashboard displays only authorized data and features.
Secretaria attempts unauthorized action (e.g., delete procedure).
Verify action is blocked and logged.
Anesthesiologist edits secretary permissions.
Verify updated permissions take effect immediately.

title: Stripe Subscription Integration and Webhook Handling
description: Test subscription sign-up, checkout flow, and webhook notifications for payment updates and subscription status.

steps.description: Navigate to subscription plans page.
Select a plan and proceed to Stripe checkout.
Complete checkout with valid payment details.
Verify user subscription status is updated to active.
Simulate Stripe webhook for payment succeeded event.
Verify webhook is received and subscription data is updated properly.
Simulate failed payment and subscription cancellation webhook.
Verify user access restrictions are enforced after cancellation.

title: Real-time Notifications System
description: Ensure notifications related to alerts, payment updates, and system events are delivered and displayed in real-time.

steps.description: Trigger a notification event (e.g., new procedure added, payment received).
Verify notification appears instantly in notification bell menu.
Mark notification as read.
Verify notification status changes accordingly and persists after page reload.
Test notification reception when user is offline and reconnects.
Verify missed notifications are synchronized and displayed.

title: User Profile and Account Settings Management
description: Validate that users can update profile information, preferences, and delete their accounts with proper confirmations.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to settings page.
Update profile details such as name, email, and preferences.
Verify changes are saved and reflected in user profile.
Request account deletion.
Confirm deletion action.
Verify account is deleted, and user is logged out and cannot log back in.
Attempt account deletion cancellation if supported.
Verify operation is canceled and account remains active.

title: UI Responsiveness and Accessibility
description: Verify the UI is responsive across devices and meets accessibility standards.

steps.description: Open application on multiple device screen sizes (desktop, tablet, mobile).
Verify layout adjusts properly with no content overflow or truncation.
Navigate through all major UI components using keyboard only.
Verify all interactive elements are focusable and usable.
Use screen reader to navigate through pages.
Verify that screen reader reads out labels and content correctly.

title: Performance and Load Testing on Core Routes
description: Ensure that key routes maintain response time below 2 seconds under typical and peak load.

steps.description: Simulate user traffic on main routes including login, dashboard, procedure list, and financial module.
Measure response times and verify they are consistently below 2 seconds.
Simulate peak concurrent users load.
Verify system maintains uptime of 99.9% and response criteria.

title: Data Security and Compliance Validation
description: Verify that all sensitive data is encrypted, access controlled, and handled per LGPD requirements.

steps.description: Inspect backend data storage to confirm encryption of medical and financial data.
Attempt unauthorized data access via API or UI.
Verify access is denied and access control policies with RLS are enforced.
Verify data deletion requests for compliance are processed accurately.
Confirm that all personal data is removed within regulatory timeframes.
